trip.pageSubtitle: Banff, Alberta to Antelope Wells, NM
trip.summ: The Great Divide Mountain Bike Route

haPages.pageTitle: Day 1 - Leaving Banff was the easy part.
haPages.h3SubTitle: Those hills didn't look so steep in the pictures
haPages.pPostMeta: Tuesday, June 9, 2015 Banff, Alberta, Canada to Bolton Trading Post

haPages.pageTitle: Day 2 - Tires and Helmets
haPages.h3SubTitle: First Divide pass and a shaky set of tires
haPages.pPostMeta: Wednesday, June 10, 2015 Bolton Trading Post to Elkford, BC

haPages.pageTitle: Day 3 - Fixing the Bike and shedding gear
haPages.h3SubTitle: Another short ride and then some maintenance
haPages.pPostMeta: Thursday, June 11, 2015 Elkford to Sparwood

haPages.pageTitle: Day 04 - Stream or Trail??
haPages.h3SubTitle: Two passes then ...shooting guns and blowing stuff up
haPages.pPostMeta: Friday, June 12, 2015 Sparwood to part way up Cabin Pass

haPages.pageTitle: Day 5 - Cabin Pass, The Wall (WTF) and Galton Pass
haPages.h3SubTitle: Last day in Canada and it's a good one
haPages.pPostMeta: Saturday, June 13, 2015 Cabin Pass to Eureka, MT, USA

haPages.pageTitle: Day 6 - Whitefish Pass and Red Meadow Lake
haPages.h3SubTitle: Now I know why you don't use tubes
haPages.pPostMeta: Sunday, June 14, 2015 Eureka to Whitefish Lake, MT

haPages.pageTitle: Day 07 - Flat 40 miles to nice B&B
haPages.h3SubTitle: A partial rest, laundry and an easy 47 including an extra 4
haPages.pPostMeta: Monday, June 15, 2015 Whitefish to Ferndale, MT

haPages.pageTitle: Day 08 - Grizzly Country and climbs just for fun
haPages.h3SubTitle: Tough climbs, a nice ride until washboard - great setting at the end
haPages.pPostMeta: Tuesday, June 16, 2015 Ferndale to Holland Lake, MT
haPages.h4DateStats: left at 8:39am, 8h24m, 71.8 miles, 5,697 ft of climbing

haPages.pageTitle: Day 9 - Richmond Peak & Ovando
haPages.h3SubTitle: Circling Richmond Peak and a huge save
haPages.pPostMeta: Wednesday, June 17, 2015 Holland Lake to Ovando, MT

haPages.pageTitle: Day 10 - 4 peaks = 10K climbing
haPages.h3SubTitle: Walk the last pass - camp when it gets dark
haPages.pPostMeta: Thursday, June 18, 2015 Ovando to Priest Pass, MT

haPages.pageTitle: Day 11 - Helena - Rest day on N. Davis St
haPages.h3SubTitle: Trail magic, great breakfast, like new tires and a derailleur-hanger
haPages.pPostMeta: Friday, June 19, 2015 Priest Pass to Helena, MT

haPages.pageTitle: Day 12 - Rocks, Roots and Missed Buses
haPages.h3SubTitle: Paying for wrong turns
haPages.pPostMeta: Saturday, June 20, 2015 Helena to Butte, MT

haPages.pageTitle: Day 13 - Rerouting to Jim's Tour Divide
haPages.h3SubTitle: Chocolate Milk at Great Divide Outfitters
haPages.pPostMeta: Sunday, June 21, 2015 Butte to Wise River

haPages.pageTitle: Day 14 - Stretching it out and covering ground
haPages.h3SubTitle: What about this road by the reservoir?
haPages.pPostMeta: Monday, June 22, 2015 Wise River to Lima

haPages.pageTitle: Day 15 - Wide open spaces
haPages.h3SubTitle: Leaving Montana (finally)
haPages.pPostMeta: Tuesday, June 23, 2015 Lima to Mack's Inn

haPages.pageTitle: Day 16 - Scenic Byway and some assistance
haPages.h3SubTitle: Past Mesa Falls towards the Tetons
haPages.pPostMeta: Wednesday, June 24, 2015 Island Park to Flagg Ranch, WY

haPages.pageTitle: Day 17 - Grand Teton NP in AM, Togwotee in PM
haPages.h3SubTitle: Lost tourists and finding hidden lakes
haPages.pPostMeta: Thursday, June 25, 2015 Flagg Ranch to Lava Mountain Lodge, WY

haPages.pageTitle: Day 18 - Union Pass only better
haPages.h3SubTitle: The Devil's Hole Trail and riding the divide
haPages.pPostMeta: Friday, June 26, 2015 Lava Mountain Lodge to Pinedale, WY

haPages.pageTitle: Day 19 - Wyoming - after the mountains
haPages.h3SubTitle: A long, hot day in the desert
haPages.pPostMeta: Saturday, June 27, 2015 Pinedale to Atlantic City, WY

haPages.pageTitle: Day 20 - Another long day in Wyoming's Great Basin
haPages.h3SubTitle: Water supply and disappearing jeep trails
haPages.pPostMeta: Sunday, June 28, 2015 Atlantic City to Wamsutter, WY

haPages.pageTitle: Day 21 - Brush Mountain Lodge
haPages.h3SubTitle: My birthday in a slice of heaven
haPages.pPostMeta: Monday, June 29, 2015 - Wamsutter, WY to Brush Mtn Lodge, CO

haPages.pageTitle: Day 22 - Colorado Mountains
haPages.h3SubTitle: Long steady climbs and descents
haPages.pPostMeta: Tuesday, June 30, 2015 Brush Mountain Lodge to Steamboat Springs, CO

haPages.pageTitle: Day 23 - A long day out on the road
haPages.h3SubTitle: A giant coast into Kremmling and mind games
haPages.pPostMeta: Wednesday, July 1, 2015 Steamboat Springs to Dillon, CO

haPages.pageTitle: Day 24 - Dillon Reservoir, Breckenridge and Boreas Pass
haPages.h3SubTitle: Highest pass on my tour
haPages.pPostMeta: Thursday, July 2, 2015 Dillon to Hartsel, CO</p

haPages.pageTitle: Day 25 - July weather
haPages.h3SubTitle: More afternoon rains and washboard roads
haPages.pPostMeta: Friday, July 3, 2015 Hartsel to Salida, CO

haPages.pageTitle: Day 26 - Marshall Pass and the Colorado Trail
haPages.h3SubTitle: Teepees, Rain and the 4th of July
haPages.pPostMeta: Saturday, July 4, 2015 Salida to Sargents, CO

haPages.pageTitle: Day 27 - Lighting and Thunder in the afternoon
haPages.h3SubTitle: Two passes and outrunning the rain
haPages.pPostMeta: Sunday, July 5, 2015 Sargents to Del Norte, CO

haPages.pageTitle: Day 28 - Getting some rest and plotting my course
haPages.h3SubTitle: The Library, Amish Cinnamon Rolls and Wild Boar
haPages.pPostMeta: Monday, July 6, 2015 Del Norte
haPages.h4DateStats: Sleeping in at the Windsor Hotel - zero ft of climbing

haPages.pageTitle: Day 29 - A tough call to avoid thunderstorms
haPages.h3SubTitle: Riding in the rain
haPages.pPostMeta: Tuesday, July 7, 2015 DelNorte to Antonito, CO

haPages.pageTitle: Day 30 - Entering the final state
haPages.h3SubTitle: Dum spelled backward
haPages.pPostMeta: Wednesday, July 8, 2015 Antonito, CO to Abiquiu, NM

haPages.pageTitle: Day 31 - Abiquiu Reservoir and more desert
haPages.h3SubTitle: On the Road. Avoiding the mud.
haPages.pPostMeta: Thursday, July 9, 2015 Abiquiu to Cuba

haPages.pageTitle: Day 32 - Long day with an assist
haPages.h3SubTitle: Rain, wind and desert
haPages.pPostMeta: Friday, July 10, 2015 Cuba to Grants, NM

haPages.pageTitle: Day 33 - El Malpais National Monument
haPages.h3SubTitle: Morning riding and snakes on the bed
haPages.pPostMeta: Saturday, July 11, 2015 Grants to Quemado, NM

haPages.pageTitle: Day 34 - The Afternoon Wind Switch
haPages.h3SubTitle: Apache Creek, Reserve and an extra 30 miles
haPages.pPostMeta: Sunday, July 12, 2015 Quemado to Glenwood, NM

haPages.pageTitle: Day 35 - On to Silver City
haPages.h3SubTitle: The last divide crossing, really

haPages.pageTitle: Day 36 - No more days
haPages.h3SubTitle: It's all downhill from here
haPages.pPostMeta: Tuesday, July 14, 2015 Silver City, NM to Palomas, Mexico
